ksa_text: Ability to design and execute testing and validation procedures for data systems, ensuring systems achieve intended purposes before deployment.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Data Architecture & Analytics KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.0) to justify inclusion for the Director of Master Data Management. Without stronger framework alignment, this ability KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain ability KSA be expected in real-world Director of Master Data Management roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm Data Architecture & Analytics is not a standard competency expectation for Director of Master Data Management. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the Director of Master Data Management competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.0) and edge-domain placement (Data Architecture & Analytics) do not meet inclusion threshold for the Director of Master Data Management. All passes support exclusion.
